solutions.solution: If step IV of an input is 'none of the players have turned lately' Step IV would be the 9th step? 1) have players none the turned lately of 2) India players have turned the none of 3) have the none players turned India of 4) India have players none of the turned 5) None of these

Input: most of the players were given approvals. Which of the following will be the 4th step for this input? 1) approvals were given the most players of 2) the players of most were given approvals 3) approvals given were the players most of 4) given approvals players were of the most 5) None of these

If step V of an input is 'none of the has happened at all', what would be step VIII of the input? 1) happened all at of none has this 2) all at happened none of as this 3) this has none of at all happened 4) Can't be determined 5) None of these

If step I of an input is 'in this form of trading by Amway', what would be Step VII of the input? 1) Amway in trading by form of this 2) in this trading by form of Amway 3) Amway is trading by this of form 4) Can't be determined 5) None of these. Sol.: Step A: Let us take first two words i.e. software and script to see that, 0 to 1 # 1 to 2, 0 to 1 # 2 to 3, 0 to 1 → 3 to 4. Hence 1 to 5 as 3 Step B: In (Q1) the largest range is 0 to 4. In Q 2, we have to find 4 to 9. By golden rule: 4 to 9 = 1 to 6? Q 3, we have to find 0 to 4 and it can't be reduced. In Q 5, we have 5 to 4 and it can't be reduced. In Q 6, we have 1 to 7 and it can't be reduced. The largest number in these five pairs (0 to 4, 1 to 6, 0 to 4, 5 to 6 and 1 to 7) is 7 so we would draw our reference chart upto Step VII.
